source.title: Long-term prognostic value of ctDNA in early breast cancer: insights from the neoadjuvant ABCSG-34 Trial.

finding.description: Baseline ctDNA positivity was significantly associated with inferior overall survival.
finding.effect_summary: Baseline ctDNA positivity associated with inferior overall survival.

source_quote: Baseline ctDNA positivity was significantly associated with inferior overall survival (HR 2.12, p = 0.043) and shorter survival durations across all endpoints.

source.title: Long-term prognostic value of ctDNA in early breast cancer: insights from the neoadjuvant ABCSG-34 Trial.

finding.description: Trends toward improved outcomes were observed in patients who cleared ctDNA during NAT.
finding.effect_summary: Trends toward improved outcomes in patients who cleared ctDNA during NAT.

source_quote: Trends toward improved outcomes were observed in patients who cleared ctDNA during NAT, though statistical significance was not reached-likely due to limited sample size.
